element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Stone on foot with pistol, required for switch activation and tight spaces
alternative combat style and mechanics distinct from Nitro
secondary weapon layer, can be disabled by damage
vulnerable to Stone's pistol when unsuited, can steal mechs
mission progression gates, risk/reward of vulnerability
managing suit transitions, strategic loadout planning

typical_relief_triggers: finding new mecha suit after ejection
entering safe zones with suit scouts
typical_tension_triggers: Stone on foot vulnerability (instant kill risk)
required switch activation in hostile territory
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: mission-based exploration with action bursts punctuated by vulnerability windows when ejected; tension escalates through campaign with multi-suit requirements and introduced suit mechanics

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: scout-ahead possibilities when Stone ejects and explores smaller spaces unsuited enemies ignore
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Some enemies ignore unsuited marines, enabling covert scout paths

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to Nitro suit, basic ejection mechanics, foundational enemy types
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of additional suit types (Havoc, Prometheus, Spider), varied backpack power-ups, multi-suit stage requirements emerge
difficulty_curve.late_game: Endgame suits (Ballistic, Drache), gravity inverter puzzles, complex multi-suit scenarios, escalated enemy density
notable_spikes: First required suit ejection in hostile territory
Mission involving ship defense with Prometheus units (promoted to captain)
Late-campaign multi-suit transitions under heavy enemy fire

notable_level_patterns.description: Early missions set in space focused on resource gathering and agent rescue (e.g., rescuing Marissa from Axis 5, capturing supply ship and asteroid base)
Missions requiring specific suit deployment for static or semi-mobile defense (e.g., defending main ship with stolen Prometheus units)
Stages requiring player to abandon current suit, navigate as Stone through tight spaces or switch-activated doors, then acquire new suit type
Later stages allowing multiple suit types in same stage, requiring strategic abandonment and re-acquisition based on encounter type
